report.summary: Day 70 standup #6: No new agent activity since standup v4. Git locks persist 8 days — 637+ uncommitted files, 0 deploys, 0 commits. 427+ slugs declared, ~315 in production. 2 guides still in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Today's total: 20 agent runs ($1,759). All priorities unchanged: clear git locks, deploy, halt new builds.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v4: No new agents ran. Zero content built, zero pages promoted, zero deploys. All metrics unchanged.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 427+ declared in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~315 in production (last deploy Mar 17, e999560). Gap: ~112+ pages invisible to Google.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 guides pending promotion — decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026, cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026.
SEO RISK: 8 days without deploy. Production/local drift at 637+ files. Every hour without deploy = more stale production content vs what's been built.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — unchanged. Will 404 in production.
API HEALTH: All 6 core routes healthy. CoinGecko/DefiLlama nominal. Cache/circuit breakers active.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v4: Nothing. No agents ran between v4 and this cycle.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 8 learn guides built, 7 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 4+ OG images, 8+ social posts + 2 SVG cards, 3 QA cycles, 3 design audits, 20 agent runs across ~3.5 rotations. Zero deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop components.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 38+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure (no fallback data).
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 38+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, next lint misconfigured, cache header inconsistency on 4/6 API routes.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. ~4,500+ insertions at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → verify Vercel. Nothing else matters until this is done.
PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 QUEUED GUIDES: decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026 and cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026 from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES before deploy commit.
PRIORITY 3 — ZERO NEW CONTENT: 427+ slugs declared, ~315 in production. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 112+ pages. Halt all build cycles until production catches up.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Today produced 8 guides + 7 promotions + social assets + QA across 20 agent runs. Production saw zero of it. Marginal value of next build cycle = $0 until deploy unblocks. Shift all agent budget to ops/deploy/fix.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,759 (20 runs: standup×5 $225, build×4 $932, publish×2 $110, design×3 $180, community×3 $123, eod×3 $189)
